chunks.text: Senior Backend Engineer at TechCorp. Built microservices in Java Spring Boot handling 10k requests per second.
DevOps experience: deployed applications using Docker and Kubernetes. Set up CI/CD pipelines in GitHub Actions.
Database administration: designed PostgreSQL schemas, optimized complex queries, and implemented Redis caching.
Frontend developer intern. Created responsive UIs using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.
Machine Learning Engineer. Developed NLP models using PyTorch and HuggingFace. Deployed RAG pipelines using pgvector.
Project Manager. Led agile teams of 10+ engineers, tracked sprints using Jira, and presented quarterly OKRs.
Mobile App Developer. Published iOS and Android apps using Flutter and Dart. Reached 50k active users.
Security Specialist. Conducted penetration testing, implemented OAuth2, and ensured SOC2 compliance.
Data Engineer. Built ETL pipelines with Apache Spark and Kafka. Managed data warehouses in Snowflake.
Cloud Architect. Designed highly available architectures on AWS using EC2, S3, Lambda, and DynamoDB.
Technical Support Engineer. Resolved 500+ customer tickets using Zendesk. Triaged bugs and escalated to engineering.
Product Marketing Manager. Ran go-to-market campaigns for B2B SaaS. Authored blog posts and whitepapers that drove 20k leads.
Graphic Designer. Created branding assets using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop. Designed trade show banners.
Quality Assurance Analyst. Wrote automated test scripts using Selenium and Python. Executed manual testing for mobile apps.

cases.jd_text: Looking for a backend engineer. Must have strong Java and Spring Boot experience.
We need a DevOps professional who is an expert in Docker and Kubernetes.
PostgreSQL database administrator needed to optimize queries.
Frontend role requiring React and Next.js skills.
Looking for an AI engineer to build RAG pipelines.
Scrum master / Project manager who is proficient with Jira.
Mobile engineer with Flutter experience wanted.
Cybersecurity role. Need someone to help us achieve SOC2 compliance.
Data engineer to work with Spark and Kafka streaming.
Full Stack Developer. Must be proficient in React frontend and Java Spring Boot backend.
Looking for an engineer who has experience in both Quality Assurance automation and DevOps CI/CD.
Seeking a multi-disciplinary individual to handle Customer Technical Support and B2B Product Marketing.
We need someone to manage our data pipeline in Snowflake and also design graphic branding assets.
